ns0:entry.ns0:title: BoundaryML/baml
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BoundaryML/baml
Language: rust
The AI framework that adds the engineering to prompt engineering (Python/TS/Ruby/Java/C#/Rust/Go compatible)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
Language: rust
⚡ Python-free Rust inference server — OpenAI-API compatible. GGUF + SafeTensors, hot model swap, auto-discovery, single binary. FREE now, FREE forever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/ncx-infra-controller-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/ncx-infra-controller-core
Language: rust
NCX Infra Controller - Hardware Lifecycle Management and multitenant networking

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SaladDay/cc-switch-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SaladDay/cc-switch-cli
Language: rust
⭐️ A cross-platform CLI All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ai-dynamo/dynamo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ai-dynamo/dynamo
Language: rust
A Datacenter Scale Distributed Inference Serving Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
Language: rust
A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ilya-zlobintsev/LACT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ilya-zlobintsev/LACT
Language: rust
Linux GPU Configuration And Monitoring Tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juspay/hyperswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juspay/hyperswitch
Language: rust
An open source payments switch written in Rust to make payments fast, reliable and affordable

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memvid/memvid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qxcnm/Codex-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qxcnm/Codex-Manager
Language: rust
一个Codex cli 账号管理与切换工具。为 Codex cli提供本地网关转发。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rust-lang/rust-analyzer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust-analyzer
Language: rust
A Rust compiler front-end for IDEs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tauri-apps/tauri
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tauri-apps/tauri
Language: rust
Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop and mobile applications with a web frontend.
